page_subtitle_live: The current instance is verified. Continue directly into servers and the next management flows.
page_subtitle_preview: This is the next homepage preview, intended for checking layout, density, and interaction progress.
home_live_description: Confirm current state first, then enter the concrete server and plugin flows. The homepage keeps only the overview, action entry, and attention lane.
home_preview_description: This page currently validates the next shell homepage IA: summary strip, action band, server workspace, and attention lane.
home_workspace_empty_title: There is no server workspace to enter yet
home_workspace_empty_description: Start with create or import. Once servers appear, this area becomes the object-centered workbench.
home_attention_empty_title: There are no alerts that need to be raised right now
home_attention_empty_description: When runtime failures, startup issues, or plugin extension notices occur, they surface here first.
home_workspace_count_label: {count} servers are currently in the workspace
home_palette_deploy_hint: Double-click or drag out to deploy this card
home_palette_limit_reached: This card has reached its current instance limit
home_operations_description: Keep immediate next actions here. This band should stay focused on create, import, and refresh instead of turning into a general card wall.
home_attention_description: Surface runtime failures, startup blockers, and extension notices without competing with the main server workspace.
home_workspace_description: This is the primary object zone. Running, blocked, and idle servers should stay easier to read here than any secondary card.
home_server_preview_hint: This card is showing preview fallback data
home_preview_detail_running: 12 online · stable over the last 5 minutes
home_preview_detail_starting: Starting the container and validating the startup script
home_preview_detail_error: The previous exit left error logs behind. Check alerts first
home_plugin_card_placeholder: This plugin card will appear here when it is ready.
home_plugin_card_unavailable: This card is unavailable right now.
home_missing_renderer_message: This card can't be shown right now.
next_placeholder_meta_description: Navigation and entry points are in place.
hero_description: You are signed in to the current SeaLantern instance and can continue management from here.
card_auth_description: This browser has passed verification for the current instance.
card_scope_description: Subsequent management modules will continue to land here.
card_switch_description: If you need to switch identity or device, exit the current session and verify again.
section_status_title: Keep credentials only on trusted devices
section_status_description: If this environment is no longer safe, exit the current session to clear any locally saved access credential.
